title: Cannot federate with filter-not-exists
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test A', 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'Test B', NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM test_table WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.value = test_table.value AND t2.name = 'Test A');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
key_bug_features: filter not exists clause in federated queries
